sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30823" key="ei)=ar" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἶαρ</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εἰᾰρινός</orth>, <sense id="n30823.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἔαρ</ref> </xr> (A and B), <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἐαρινός</foreign>.</sense> </entryFree>
